name: 01 Performance Analysis
title: Performance Analysis: sar, iostat, vmstat
description: Find bottlenecks in CPU, disk, and memory using the USE method and classic Linux tools.

name: 02 Network Troubleshooting
title: Network Troubleshooting: tcpdump and CLI analysis
description: When ping is not enough. Capture packets, inspect sockets, and find why connections fail.

name: 03 Disaster Recovery
title: Disaster Recovery (Rescue Mode)
description: You broke the system. It will not boot. No SSH. Learn chroot, GRUB edits, and recovering lost root passwords.

name: 04 KVM Virtualization
title: KVM/QEMU and Libvirt Virtualization

name: 05 High Availability
title: High Availability: Clusters and Load Balancers
description: Design systems that survive failures. VIPs, Keepalived VRRP, HAProxy, and an intro to Pacemaker.
